    @allure.title("GET /api/v1/chat/message/unread-count/ - count increases after receiving message")
    @allure.severity(allure.severity_level.NORMAL)
    def test_unread_count_increases_after_message(self, auth_headers):
        """
        Purpose: Verify that unread count increases after sending a message to the room
        """
        with allure.step("Get current unread count"):
            url = f"{BASE_URL}/api/v1/chat/message/unread-count/"
            before = requests.get(url, headers=auth_headers)
            assert before.status_code == 200
            count_before = before.json()["count"]
    
        with allure.step("Send a new message"):
            msg_url = f"{BASE_URL}/api/v1/chat/message/{ROOM_ID}/"
            payload = {"message": "Unread count test message", "receiver_id": RECEIVER_ID}
            msg_resp = requests.post(msg_url, json=payload, headers=auth_headers)
>           assert msg_resp.status_code in [200, 201]
E           assert 403 in [200, 201]
E            +  where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code
